/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/profiling_info_proto.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libprofiling_info_proto.so -o libprofiling_info_proto.so CMakeFiles/profiling_info_proto.dir/__/__/tensorflow/lite/profiling/proto/profiling_info.pb.cc.o  ../../_deps/protobuf-build/libprotobuf.a
